pcaconnectorad.connector.CfnAbout: Creates a connector between AWS Private CA and an Active Directory. You must specify the private CA, directory ID, and security groups.

pcaconnectorad.connector.CertificateAuth.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the certificate authority being used.

pcaconnectorad.connector.DirectoryId.Description: The identifier of the Active Directory.

pcaconnectorad.connector.Tags.Description: Metadata assigned to a connector consisting of a key-value pair.

pcaconnectorad.connector.VpcInformation.Description: Information of the VPC and security group(s) used with the connector.
